title: For Vanilla Flowers
description: Place up to 4 flowers in the same block and some in vines
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39ecdd896fcef948a6cd00997aa9319c0f66e273.png)

## Description
For Vanilla Flowers is a vanilla friendly datapack/mod that makes possible placing up to 4 of any one tall flowers together in the same block, attach flowers in vines, and more. Also including some Bedrock Edition parities.

## Important notes
- May present some inconsistencies with the vine flowers in creative mode
- Made and tested for 1.21.5+
- Some plants that are flower pots excusive DO NOT need to be crafted
- A bug that makes all flowers a little bit dimmer than the vanilla ones. That is a game bug and can't be fixed until mojang fix themselves [[MC-260687](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-260687)]
- When crafted, the flowers will turn into bat spawn eggs. However, DO NOT click with it in a monster spawner or it will be disabled (Will NOT create a bat spawner)
- Works fine in multiplayer (only the host needs the mod)

## How it works
To be able to place the flowers you need to craft them first. Just place 4 of the same flower into the crafting grid:

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/280060ac47cc0776ff53786f7b3cbc0b6ef19e6f.png)

You can uncraft by placing the item in the offhand (pressing "F", default key):

![uncrafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d15c74302c5dda04302f5f556fc425a8543608e6.png)


<details>
<summary>ITEMS THAT NEED TO BE CRAFTED BEFORE USING</summary>

## FLOWERS:
- Flower Pot
- Dandelion
- Poppy
- Blue Orchid
- Allium
- Azure Bluet
- Red Tulip
- Orange Tulip
- White Tulip
- Pink Tulip
- Oxeye Daisy
- Cornflower
- Lily of the Valley
- Wither Rose
- Torchflower
- Open Eyeblossom
- Closed Eyeblossom
## FUNGI:
- Red Mushroom
- Brown Mushroom
- Crimson Fungus
- Warped Fungus
## LILY PAD:
- Cactus Flowers
- Spore Blossoms

</details>


<details>
<summary>FLOWER POTS EXCLUSIVES (NO CRAFTING NEEDED)</summary>

- Oak Sapling
- Spruce Sapling
- Birch Sapling
- Jungle Sapling
- Acacia Sapling
- Dark Oak Sapling
- Cherry Sapling
- Fern
- Dead Bush
- Cactus
- Bamboo
- Azalea
- Flowering Azalea
- Crimson Roots
- Warped Roots
- Mangrove Propagule
- Pale Oak Sapling

</details>



## Features
All kinds of one tall flowers, mushrooms and fungi can be placed in the same block in any order:

![all](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c3cb25f68d21165f5219eb799dc5af03e0481a.png)

Flower Pots are able to place up to 4 in the same block aswell:

![flower_pots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52157a97dca71ae764a6ffcef6777379bc2f1be0.png)

Pink Petals and Wildflowers can now be attached to vines:

![vines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b00cd322fa9c9b3a8dc06cb1bf5001c36932ddc0.png)

You can place Cactus Flowers and Spore Blossoms above Lily Pads:

![lily pad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ac31d3abbb7fe257c5f4620bb12c05bea01ba96.png)

## Bedrock Edition Parities
Flowers, mushrooms and fungi can be snowlogged:

![snowlogged](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/232b0cb98280ebe044b6f739925ed3267f913e1e.png)

One tall flowers can directly be bone mealed to grow more of the same kind around (excluding wither roses and torchflowers):

![bone mealable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe6153d07b2d65cad18823e0f591bdb77306199c.png)
